Metadata.homeDescription: Personalized digital invitations for weddings and celebrations in Portugal, with online RSVP, maps, music, models and simple WhatsApp sharing.

Landing.heroBody: Our invitations were created to surprise, move and transform every detail into an unforgettable moment. More than a simple invitation, it's a unique digital experience.
Landing.defaultWhatsappMessage: Hello! I would like to request a quote for a Brindeal digital invitation.
Landing.galleryEmpty: No featured invitations in this category yet.
Landing.footerDescription: Personal, elegant digital invitations made with care.

LandingContact.body: Tell us your event style and what you already have in mind. We reply the same day with a clear proposal, no commitment.
LandingContact.name: Name
LandingContact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us the style, venue or any important detail.

LandingBestSellers.title: Our most-loved invitations
LandingBestSellers.body: The models couples reach for the most. Tap one to preview.

LandingGallery.title: Invitations for all events
LandingGallery.body: Explore each template, see the features, customization levels and pricing, and find the perfect template for your event.
LandingGallery.empty: No featured invitations in this category yet.

LandingProcess.title: From the first chat to the final share.
LandingProcess.body: We walk you through every step, from the initial conversation to publishing the invitation. No surprises, with clear timelines and transparent payment.
steps: We talk about your event's style, the colors and the details you'd like to see in the invitation.
Once you choose a model, you settle 50% or 100% of the value. The project starts as soon as the payment is confirmed.
We send a preview for approval, with one full design change included (when available) and up to 3 text edits at no extra cost.
After approval, we share the invitation as a link or QR code, with a private dashboard to track RSVPs in real time.
LandingProcess.previewMessageB: Perfect! I'll send a proposal today ✦
LandingProcess.revisionFees: Once these edits are used or the design is finally approved, additional design changes cost €5 each and text or info changes €2.50 each.

LandingFeatures.title: What you'll find in our invitations
LandingFeatures.body: Guests receive a clear link. You track confirmations, choices and messages without loose sheets or lost conversations.
LandingFeatures.rsvpBody: Automated RSVPs: guests reply right inside the invitation and everything stays organized in a single dashboard.
LandingFeatures.rsvpImageAlt: Confirmations dashboard showing the guest list in real time
LandingFeatures.musicText: All invitations include music with autoplay. Music is optional and can be a song chosen by the couple.
LandingFeatures.mapText: Directions, GPS and details to arrive stress-free.
LandingFeatures.guestsText: Table and companions organized. Personal link available on templates with name personalization included.
LandingFeatures.analyticsText: Know who opened, confirmed and replied.
LandingFeatures.languagesText: Portuguese, English and Spanish to welcome everyone well.
LandingFeatures.customText: Typography, colors and photos chosen for your day.
LandingFeatures.personalizationText: Name personalization is optional. To include each guest's name, table number and guest number on the invitation, a per-unit fee applies and varies with the total number of invitations.
LandingFeatures.personalizationModalDescription: The fee is charged per personalized invitation and varies with the order size.

LandingLiveDemo.title: See how guests will open it
LandingLiveDemo.body: Explore real examples on a phone and feel how the experience reaches whoever receives the invitation.

LandingFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
LandingFaq.body: Everything you need to know before we start. Can't find the answer? We can talk on WhatsApp.

urgency.question: Can I order my invitation with urgency?
urgency.answer: Yes. For an extra {price} we deliver your invitation within 2 working days.

items.question: What is the turnaround time?
items.answer: Turnaround ranges from 7 days to one month, depending on demand and the chosen model.

items.question: Can I personalize my invitation?
items.answer: Yes. We have fully customizable invitations as well as pre-designed templates — check each model's description.

items.question: Can I order for other events besides weddings?
items.answer: Yes, we create invitations for all kinds of events.

items.question: Can I personalize the invitation with the guest's name?
items.answer: Yes, with an additional fee per personalized invitation.

items.question: Can I receive the invitation as a PDF?
items.answer: Yes, but you risk receiving the pages split apart, and some features don't work in the PDF version.

items.question: How many changes can I make to the invitation?
items.answer: During production you can change the design once and edit texts up to 3 times at no cost. After approval, any further change carries an additional fee.

items.question: Do I need to share a WhatsApp number for confirmations?
items.answer: No. We use an integrated system that makes it easy to manage and track every confirmation.

items.question: How long does the invitation stay online?
items.answer: The domain stays live for 2 years.

items.question: Do you only make invitations in Portuguese?
items.answer: No. We make invitations in any language and for anywhere in the world.

items.question: Do you issue invoices?
items.answer: Yes, we issue invoices. We are a duly registered company.

LandingFooter.description: Personal, elegant digital invitations made with care.
